text: Week 1 focuses on Python Foundation. Learners practice syntax, data types, functions, loops, file handling, pandas, regex, API calls, pip, venv, and dotenv.
Week 2 focuses on AI Architecture and OCR. Learners draw system architecture, process images and PDFs, extract text, clean OCR output, and chunk text for RAG.
Week 3 focuses on LLM and RAG System. Learners study prompt engineering, embeddings, vector database, cosine similarity, retrieval, answer generation, LangChain, and RAG evaluation.
Week 4 focuses on building and demoing a complete local AI Chatbot. Learners build FastAPI backend, Streamlit chat UI, upload flow, OCR to RAG pipeline, citations, testing, and local demo.
